message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Backup Process Sequence Diagram

participant "main" as main
participant "bkup.BackupFacade" as backupFacade
participant "srcrepo.SourceRepository" as sourceRepo
participant "dstrepo.DestinationRepository" as destRepo
participant "metarepo.MetadataRepository" as metadataRepo
participant "scanner.AllFileScanner" as fileScanner
database "FileSystem" as fs
database "SQLite3" as db

== execute() ==
activate main
activate backupFacade

== Get all files ==
activate backupFacade
backupFacade ->> fileScanner : get_all_files()
activate fileScanner
fileScanner ->> fs : 
fs --> fileScanner : 
deactivate fileScanner
fileScanner --> backupFacade : all_files
deactivate backupFacade

== Get source files ==
activate backupFacade
backupFacade ->> sourceRepo : get_files_matching_criteria(all_files)
activate sourceRepo
sourceRepo --> backupFacade : src_files
deactivate sourceRepo
deactivate backupFacade

== Cleanup of metadata corresponding to already deleted files ==
activate backupFacade
backupFacade ->> metadataRepo : get_uncontained_keys(src_files)
activate metadataRepo
metadataRepo ->> db : SELECT
db --> metadataRepo : result
metadataRepo --> backupFacade : uncontained_keys
deactivate metadataRepo

backupFacade ->> metadataRepo : remove_metadatas(uncontained_keys)
activate metadataRepo
loop until the generator finishes
    metadataRepo ->> db : DELETE
    db --> metadataRepo : yield removed_metadata <return value is discarded>
end
deactivate metadataRepo
deactivate backupFacade

== Create backup and update metadata ==
activate backupFacade
backupFacade ->> backupFacade : _get_backup_list(src_files)
backupFacade --> backupFacade : backup_list
backupFacade ->> destRepo : create_backups(backup_list)
activate destRepo
loop until the generator finishes
    destRepo ->> fs : shutil.copy2(src_file, dst_file)
    fs --> destRepo : yield backed_up_src_file
    destRepo ->> metadataRepo : update_metadata(backed_up_src_file)
    activate metadataRepo
    metadataRepo ->> db : REPLACE INTO
    deactivate metadataRepo
end
deactivate destRepo
deactivate backupFacade

== Discard old backups ==
activate backupFacade
backupFacade ->> destRepo : get_discard_list(today, all_files)
activate destRepo
destRepo --> backupFacade : discard_list
backupFacade ->> destRepo : remove_backups(discard_list)
loop until the generator finishes
    destRepo ->> fs : os.remove(file_to_be_removed)
    fs --> destRepo : yield removed_file <return value is discarded>
end
deactivate destRepo
deactivate backupFacade

backupFacade --> main : return
deactivate main
@enduml
```
